summary: Interactive pin board application for tracking travel locations on World and Appalachian Trail maps
architectural_notes: Using Leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles for interactive maps
Two separate map boards: World map and Appalachian Trail map
Pin points represent visited locations with place names

existing_features.title: Replace static map images with interactive Leaflet maps using OpenStreetMap tiles in both WorldMapPage and ATMapPage components
Display place name on hover over map pinpoints
Add edit and delete abilities to guestbook entries
Remove the generic hiking trail logo from the AT pin board
Use actual map backgrounds for both World and AT boards that correspond to the pinned points
Add zoom in/out functionality to both interactive maps

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace static map images with interactive Leaflet/OpenStreetMap maps
Show place name on hover over pinpoints
Add edit and delete abilities to entries
Remove generic hiking trail logo from AT pin board
Use actual map backgrounds for both World and AT boards corresponding to pinned points
Add zoom in/out functionality to maps

projectName: Replace static maps with interactive Leaflet maps and add hover, edit/delete, and zoom features
